race.comment: The old boy VAINSTREAM (2) disappointed in tricky conditions last start at Wagga, but he's better than what he showed there. Back in grade and back onto a track where he's placed previously. Drawn to be handy in the run - which is proving important on the Acton this season. Can bounce back in a big way. GEOSTORM (3) won over 1206m here first-up before a 1L defeat at 1280m last time out. Back to the short course now is some query, but his last two efforts have been strong and he possesses good early speed. Can be in the finish yet again. RANSAIGH STAR (4) just missed here two back before going to 1400m at Kembla Grange most recently. This suits him much better today and Martin's claim comes in handy. Can bounce back to form. INTO THE FIRE (6) bolted in here two starts back before feeling the pinch over further last start. Back to the scene of the crime and he makes plenty of appeal. DANTAINS PRIZE (10) has to be included on his last start win.
